tweets.text:
its funny how a few ppl rush to say 'this is made up' but to the extent that it matters, i can assure you this is true.  

it may not be representative, but this did happen

Google Senior Staff Engineer to me: “Yeah, I have no clue what Claude Code / Codex is but I hear it’s all the rage.

No, I don’t really care, I just need GOOG to hit $400 and keep this job for 2-3 more years so I can retire!”

The Claude and Gemini model used was stale (Sonnet 3.7, Gemini 1.5 Flash).

I find it odd that sycophancy despite being a known problem is just not benchmarked in big model releases, while obscure physics questions that doesn’t affect most consumers, are!

Article: https://t.co/U2CSxN4LQ0
Research: https://t.co/aYCRwPnqVv
